scripts.slides:build: pnpm run slide:ai-knowledge-breakthrough:build && pnpm run slide:type-driven-development:build
scripts.slide:ai-knowledge-breakthrough:build: slidev build ./projects/ai-knowledge-breakthrough/slides.md --out dist/ai-knowledge-breakthrough --base /ai-knowledge-breakthrough/ --download=false && mkdir -p dist/ai-knowledge-breakthrough/assets && cp -R projects/ai-knowledge-breakthrough/assets/. dist/ai-knowledge-breakthrough/assets/
scripts.slide:type-driven-development:build: slidev build ./projects/type-driven-development/slides.md --out dist/type-driven-development --base /type-driven-development/ --download=false && mkdir -p dist/type-driven-development/assets && cp -R projects/type-driven-development/assets/. dist/type-driven-development/assets/
